hero.description: A wellness journey inspired by the coasts of Greece and Italy — where olive oil, Mediterranean sea salt, sunshine and ocean breath restore every living cell.

pillars.label: Mediterranean philosophy
pillars.title: Four elements
pillars.description: Mediterranean people were once the world's healthiest and longest-lived. Their secret lies in the balance of four natural elements.
pillars.p1Desc: Deep-sea mineral salts, seaweed and hydro-pressure therapy following ancient Greek tradition.
pillars.p2Desc: Pure olive oil from Crete — the most powerful polyphenol antioxidant nature has to offer.
pillars.p3Desc: Light and heat therapy restores vitamin D, stimulates circulation and uplifts the mood.
pillars.p4Desc: Volcanic rock and Aegean sea minerals with deep-held heat for profound detoxification.

treatments.label: Treatment menu
treatments.title: Mediterranean
treatments.description: From Roman baths to olive oil massage — each treatment is a journey to the turquoise coast.

daypass.label: Day Pass & Packages
daypass.title: Choose your
daypass.description: From a quiet morning to a luxurious sunset — each Day Pass package is a complete Mediterranean experience.

booking.label: Reserve
booking.title: Hold your spot
booking.description: Book at least 24 hours in advance for the best experience. We provide a personal locker and bath towel for every guest.
booking.name: Name
booking.callLine: Or call our hotline to reserve
